title: poa macrocalyx var. tatewakiana
intro: Poa macrocalyx var. tatewakiana is a variant of the grass species Poa macrocalyx, commonly found in the mountainous regions of Japan. It is a type of grass that has been used in traditional Japanese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving symptoms of colds and flu. Poa macrocalyx var. tatewakiana can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used to support immune function and relieve respiratory issues.
